related.term: andare a gambe levate a gambe all'aria
related.meaning: cadere malamente specie all'indietro, fare un brutto ruzzolone
related.english: fall badly, especially backwards, take a nasty tumble

related.meaning: figurato andare in rovina, fallire
related.english: figuratively going broke, failing

related.term: andare a quattro gambe gatton gattoni gattoni
related.meaning: camminare sulle mani e sulle ginocchia come i bambini
related.english: walk on hands and knees like children

related.meaning: cadere, specialmente all'indietro
related.english: fall, especially backwards

related.meaning: figurato fallire
related.english: figuratively fail

meanings: action of driving, of driving, especially a vehicle
way of driving, of driving a vehicle
the set of controls of a vehicle
by extension rare who drives a vehicle, driver; pilot

related.meaning: condotto, in genere provvisto di padiglioni terminali a tromba, adoperato per raccogliere comandi orali pronunciati a un'estremità e renderli percepibili all'altra estremità; si dice anche portavoce
related.english: duct, generally provided with trumpet-shaped terminal pavilions, used to collect oral commands pronounced at one end and make them perceptible at the other end; he is also called spokesperson

related.meaning: persona esperta che per professione accompagna e assiste escursionisti, specialmente dilettanti, in arrampicate ed escursioni difficili in zone di montagna
related.english: an expert person who professionally accompanies and assists hikers, especially amateurs, on difficult climbs and excursions in mountain areas

related.meaning: cabina in cui prende posto il macchinista di treni e autotreni
related.english: cabin where the driver of trains and trucks sits

related.meaning: listello di legno che scorre in un'apposita scanalatura, facilitando l'apertura e la chiusura dei cassetti
related.english: wooden strip that slides in a special groove, facilitating the opening and closing of the drawers

related.meaning: cinema colonna sonora registrata in diretta senza particolari accorgimenti, utile solo a seguire i dialoghi in sede di montaggio o doppiaggio
related.english: cinema soundtrack recorded live without any particular precautions, useful only for following the dialogues during editing or dubbing

meanings: put on also in a figurative sense
enforce, enforce; command
assert oneself, be obeyed; be successful
be necessary

related.meaning: ecclesiastico consacrare, benedire
related.english: ecclesiastical to consecrate, to bless

related.term: dare mettere, porre, imporre l'aut aut,
related.meaning: mettere qualcuno davanti a una alternativa, obbligandolo a scegliere; sollecitare una scelta ultimativa
related.english: putting someone in front of an alternative, forcing them to choose; urge a final choice
